lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: Who buried Jesus’ body in the tomb?
Why were guards placed at the tomb?
answers: To stop the disciples from stealing the body
To attack Jesus if he rose from the dead

questions.text: What unusual things happened when the women came to the tomb?
answers: There was an earthquake and an angel rolled away the stone
They could hear someone knocking inside the tomb
They saw a spooky skeleton walking around

questions.text: What did the guards do when they saw the angel?
answers: They fainted and became like dead men

questions.text: What did the angel tell the women?
answers: Jesus isn’t here; He has risen! Go tell His disciples
You are at the wrong tomb

questions.text: What happened as the women went to tell the disciples?
answers: They got tired and had to rest

questions.text: How did the disciples respond when the women told them about Jesus?
answers: They asked a lot of questions

questions.text: What did Peter and John do after hearing about the empty tomb?
answers: They ran to the tomb to see for themselves
They wanted to check it out, but were afraid of the soldiers

questions.text: When did the disciples finally see Jesus alive again?
answers: That night in a locked room
At the temple the next morning
On the hill where he died on the cross

questions.text: How did Jesus show He was not a ghost?
answers: He ate fish and let them touch His hands and feet
He gave every disciple a high-five
He picked up a heavy stone
